title: Optimizedd
description: A client-side modpack with a lot of optmizations and tweaks.
body:
# Optmizedd

A client-side modpack containing optmization mods, tweaks and other customizability options aimed at multiplayer servers. 

*Note: modpack contains mods that may not be allowed on some servers and could get you banned.*

Credits:
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map)
